name: 홍란

personality.description:
구원자님 안녕…♪  
이렇게 둥실둥실 구름 위에 누워있다 보면, 세상 근심은 다 녹아 없어지는 것 같아요.
구원자님도 잠깐 함께 할래요…? 시간 가는 줄 모를 테죠. 참 좋을 것 같아요… 
한창 나른할 때 옆으로 굴렀더니, 구원자님의 얼굴이 가까이에 보이면… 후후…

오늘도 가온에는 너무 많은 일이 일어나고 있지만… 제 마음은 항상 같아요…
클로버 밭에서 한숨 폭 자고 일어나서 아기 토끼들이랑 얘기하고 싶어요…
언젠가 그런 평화가 꼭, 찾아왔으면… 마치 어느 날 갑자기 제 앞에 나타난 구원자님처럼요♪
personality.greeting: 세상 일이 모두 이 둥실둥실 구름 같으면 좋겠구나~

speech_patterns: 흐음… 아기 토끼들은 옷 입는 걸 좋아할까…?

아직 화해한 건 아니지만…
나중에 한 번 물어봐야지…
전에 토끼들이 풀을 너무 맛있게 먹어서…
토끼들은 이런 걸 어떻게 먹는 걸까…

구원자님이 알려준 사진 찍는 법…
꽤 익숙해졌어요…

comments.comment: 위대한 정령이 저렇게 아무한테나 웃고 무방비하게 굴다니, 좀 지나치군요.
항상 주변에 인기가 많아. …웃는 얼굴 때문인가…

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message: 흐음… 아기 토끼들은 옷 입는 걸 좋아할까…?

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message:
아직 화해한 건 아니지만…
나중에 한 번 물어봐야지…

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message: 전에 토끼들이 풀을 너무 맛있게 먹어서…

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message: 토끼들은 이런 걸 어떻게 먹는 걸까…

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message:
구원자님이 알려준 사진 찍는 법…
꽤 익숙해졌어요…

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message: 오늘 마을 아이가, 잠이 안 오면 양을 센다고…

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message:
아케나인 마을 어린이가 
산타클 로스가 진짜 있냐고 물었어요

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message: 토끼들은 착하고 순하다는 이미지가 있는 것 같지만…

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message: 겨울 구름보다 좀 더 포근하고, 촉촉하고…

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message: 가온은, 이 무렵에 산불이 잘 나는 편이에요

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message: 후음. 둥실둥실 낮잠보다 더 달콤한 것…

evertalk.speaker: 홍란
evertalk.message:
구원자님, 오늘 뭐할 거에요…?
저랑 만나요~

description.ko:
구원자님 안녕…♪  
이렇게 둥실둥실 구름 위에 누워있다 보면, 세상 근심은 다 녹아 없어지는 것 같아요.
구원자님도 잠깐 함께 할래요…? 시간 가는 줄 모를 테죠. 참 좋을 것 같아요… 
한창 나른할 때 옆으로 굴렀더니, 구원자님의 얼굴이 가까이에 보이면… 후후…

오늘도 가온에는 너무 많은 일이 일어나고 있지만… 제 마음은 항상 같아요…
클로버 밭에서 한숨 폭 자고 일어나서 아기 토끼들이랑 얘기하고 싶어요…
언젠가 그런 평화가 꼭, 찾아왔으면… 마치 어느 날 갑자기 제 앞에 나타난 구원자님처럼요♪
description.en:
Hi, Savior…♪
When I lie on the fluffy clouds, it seems all my worries about the world melt away.
Would you stay with me for a while, Savior…? You would lose track of time. It would be great…
Feeling so drowsy, I would roll to the side and see your face close to mine… Hehe…

Too many things are happening in Gaon today, but…my heart remains the same…
I want to wake up from a deep sleep in the clover field and talk to the baby rabbits…
I hope someday such peace will come, just like you, Savior…who suddenly appeared before me one day.♪
description.zh_tw:
救援者，你好呀…♪
躺在飄在天空的雲朵上，世界上所有煩心事似乎都會消失得一乾二淨。
救援者要一起躺躺看嗎…？感受不到時間的流逝，感覺不錯…
懶洋洋的時候往旁邊一滾，發現救援者的臉靠我很近…呵呵…

今天加溫也發生了很多事情…但我的想法一如往常…
我想睡在三葉草田上，睡醒後跟小兔子們聊聊天……
那麼和平的日子總有一天會到來的…就像有天出然出現在我面前的救援者一樣♪
description.zh_cn:
救援者，你好呀…♪
躺在飄在天空的雲朵上，世界上所有煩心事似乎都會消失得一乾二淨。
救援者要一起躺躺看嗎…？感受不到時間的流逝，感覺不錯…
懶洋洋的時候往旁邊一滾，發現救援者的臉靠我很近…呵呵…

今天加溫也發生了很多事情…但我的想法一如往常…
我想睡在三葉草田上，睡醒後跟小兔子們聊聊天……
那麼和平的日子總有一天會到來的…就像有天出然出現在我面前的救援者一樣♪

greeting.ko: 세상 일이 모두 이 둥실둥실 구름 같으면 좋겠구나~
greeting.en: It'd be so nice if everything were fluffy and light like these clouds~
greeting.zh_tw: 希望世界上的事都能像這飄浮的雲朵般～
greeting.zh_cn: 希望世界上的事都能像這飄浮的雲朵般～

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: There is something I want you to help me with…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 有件事希望救援者能幫我…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 有件事希望救援者能幫我…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: There's a frog on my back…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 我的背上黏著一隻青蛙…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 我的背上黏著一隻青蛙…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: but I'm afraid I might squish it…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I was walking down the street…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: and saw a puppy wearing clothes…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I wonder if a rabbit would feel warm in clothes…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 兔子穿上衣服也會比較暖和嗎…？

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 兔子穿上衣服也會比較暖和嗎…？

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message: 흐음… 아기 토끼들은 옷 입는 걸 좋아할까…?

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Hmm… Do baby rabbits like to dress?

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 嗯哼…小兔子們會喜歡穿衣服嗎…？

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 嗯哼…小兔子們會喜歡穿衣服嗎…？

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message:
아직 화해한 건 아니지만…
나중에 한 번 물어봐야지…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message:
We haven't made up with each other yet…
but I'll ask later…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message:
雖然還沒和好…
但之後要問問才行…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message:
雖然還沒和好…
但之後要問問才行…

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message: 전에 토끼들이 풀을 너무 맛있게 먹어서…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: The rabbits were eating grass so deliciously…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 之前我看兔子們吃草吃得很開心…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 之前我看兔子們吃草吃得很開心…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: so I tried to taste it because I was bored…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 今天剛好沒事做，我就試著吃吃看…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 今天剛好沒事做，我就試著吃吃看…

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message: 토끼들은 이런 걸 어떻게 먹는 걸까…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: How can rabbits eat this stuff…?

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 兔子們怎麼吃得下這種東西呢…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 兔子們怎麼吃得下這種東西呢…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 好懷念軟綿綿的棉花糖…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 好懷念軟綿綿的棉花糖…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: The squirrel went up to the Everphone…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Its soft tail touched the screen…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 用毛茸茸的尾巴觸碰畫面…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 用毛茸茸的尾巴觸碰畫面…

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message:
구원자님이 알려준 사진 찍는 법…
꽤 익숙해졌어요…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message:
You taught me how to take pictures…
I'm pretty used to it now…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message:
救援者告訴我的拍照方法…
已經蠻熟悉的了…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message:
救援者告訴我的拍照方法…
已經蠻熟悉的了…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: My photo album is full of cloud pictures…♪

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 相簿裡有一堆雲的照片…♪

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 相簿裡有一堆雲的照片…♪

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I took a lot of pictures of Yuria and Mephi…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 還有很多張尤里婭和梅菲的照片…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 還有很多張尤里婭和梅菲的照片…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: But Claire left just when I was about to take a picture…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 但準備要拍克萊兒的時候，她就突然走了…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 但準備要拍克萊兒的時候，她就突然走了…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Huh… She might be embarrassed taking pictures.

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I want to take a picture of you now… Hehe…♪

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 這次我要拍救援者…呵呵…♪

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 這次我要拍救援者…呵呵…♪

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: What do you think this is…?

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: It actually looks like a rabbit.

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: It looks like a baby rabbit…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I'm supposed to be sleeping at night…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Hee… I'll go back to sleep…

ko.speaker: 클레르
ko.message: 위대한 정령이 저렇게 아무한테나 웃고 무방비하게 굴다니, 좀 지나치군요.

en.speaker: Claire
en.message: I can't believe a Soul can just laugh at anyone and act defenseless. It's a bit too much.

zh_tw.speaker: 克萊兒
zh_tw.message: 偉大的精靈竟然對任何人都會露出笑容，還會毫無防備地滾來滾去，有點超過了。

zh_cn.speaker: 克萊兒
zh_cn.message: 偉大的精靈竟然對任何人都會露出笑容，還會毫無防備地滾來滾去，有點超過了。

en.speaker: Catherine
en.message: Hmm, I have a lot to show you from now on.

zh_tw.speaker: 凱瑟琳
zh_tw.message: 呃嗯，我以後再告訴你更多。

zh_cn.speaker: 凱瑟琳
zh_cn.message: 呃嗯，我以後再告訴你更多。

en.speaker: Haru
en.message: There are always a lot of folks around her. …Maybe it's because of her smiling face…?

zh_tw.message: 她總是受到周圍的人的歡迎…是因為她的笑容嗎…

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 這個是低頭的表情符號

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 這個是低頭的表情符號

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: It actually looks like a rabbit.

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: It looks like a baby rabbit…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I'm supposed to be sleeping at night…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Hee… I'll go back to sleep…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I think it's going to rain…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Umm… There are ice cubes in the clouds…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: They're going to melt and fall soon…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 感覺馬上就會融化落下來…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 感覺馬上就會融化落下來…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Be careful not to catch a cold…♪

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: The snowflake that I was going to give you…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 原本要給救援者的雪花結晶…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 原本要給救援者的雪花結晶…

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: It's okay. I appreciate your gesture.

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 沒關係，妳的心意我收到了

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 沒關係，妳的心意我收到了

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: It's okay. I appreciate your gesture.

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 沒關係，妳的心意我收到了

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 沒關係，妳的心意我收到了

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: How do you give a gesture…?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: No, that's not what I meant…

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: No, that's not what I meant…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I'll ask Claire how to give a gesture…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 我去問克萊兒給心意的方法…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 我去問克萊兒給心意的方法…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I'll get you one, so please wait… Savior…♪

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 我會把心意帶來的，等我哦…救援者…♪

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 我會把心意帶來的，等我哦…救援者…♪

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message: 오늘 마을 아이가, 잠이 안 오면 양을 센다고…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Today, a village kid told me that he counts sheep when he can't sleep…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 今天村莊的小孩啊，說睡不著時可以數羊…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 今天村莊的小孩啊，說睡不著時可以數羊…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I keep falling asleep at three…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 但每次算到第三隻就睡著了…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 但每次算到第三隻就睡著了…

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 因為紅蘭比較容易入睡

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 因為紅蘭比較容易入睡

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 因為紅蘭比較容易入睡

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 因為紅蘭比較容易入睡

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I want to count sheep, too…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Great… I'll count five sheep today…♪

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message:
You are…
what people around you are saying…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message:
救援者…
周圍的人說的話

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message:
救援者…
周圍的人說的話

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: do you understand all of it…?

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Is there a field of grass around here, too?

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message:
아케나인 마을 어린이가 
산타클 로스가 진짜 있냐고 물었어요

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message:
A kid from Arkenine Village 
asked me if Santacle Ross really exists.

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message:
阿肯納因村莊的小孩
問我是不是真的有聖誕老人

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message:
阿肯納因村莊的小孩
問我是不是真的有聖誕老人

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I guess you don't know either…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 看來救援者也不知道啊…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 看來救援者也不知道啊…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Hmm… Is it some kind of mysterious animal…?

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message: 토끼들은 착하고 순하다는 이미지가 있는 것 같지만…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Rabbits seem to have this image of being nice and gentle…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 雖然兔子們好像有善良溫順的形象，但是…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 雖然兔子們好像有善良溫順的形象，但是…

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message: 겨울 구름보다 좀 더 포근하고, 촉촉하고…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: It's cozier, more moist than a winter cloud…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 比起冬天的雲稍微更柔軟、濕潤…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 比起冬天的雲稍微更柔軟、濕潤…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I'll cover you up next time…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 我下次把雲蓋在你身上…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 我下次把雲蓋在你身上…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: I need to see which is the front and which is the back…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 還要花很多時間去看，哪裡是前、哪裡是後…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 還要花很多時間去看，哪裡是前、哪裡是後…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Do you know a better way…?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I'll look for clothes that have the same front and back.

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 我幫妳找找前後都一樣的衣服

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 我幫妳找找前後都一樣的衣服

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I'll look for clothes that have the same front and back.

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 我幫妳找找前後都一樣的衣服

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 我幫妳找找前後都一樣的衣服

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Have you been to a party…?

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message: 가온은, 이 무렵에 산불이 잘 나는 편이에요

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: There are lots of wildfires around this time of the year in Gaon.

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 加溫在這時候很容易發生森林大火

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 加溫在這時候很容易發生森林大火

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: So it needs to rain sometimes.

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message: 후음. 둥실둥실 낮잠보다 더 달콤한 것…

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message: Hmm. Something sweeter than sweet slumber…

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message: 呼嗯，比悠閒睡午覺更甜美的東西…

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message: 呼嗯，比悠閒睡午覺更甜美的東西…

ko.speaker: 홍란
ko.message:
구원자님, 오늘 뭐할 거에요…?
저랑 만나요~

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message:
What are you up to today, Savior…?
Let's meet!

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message:
救援者，你今天要做什麼…？
跟我見面吧～

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message:
救援者，你今天要做什麼…？
跟我見面吧～

en.speaker: Honglan
en.message:
Hmm…
Ice dragons love the winter…♪

zh_tw.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_tw.message:
嗯哼…
冰龍們也開心的冬天…♪

zh_cn.speaker: 紅蘭
zh_cn.message:
嗯哼…
冰龍們也開心的冬天…♪
